sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: $0.53 per share: Kentucky bank sets next quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Community Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-CTBI) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.53 per share. This dividend will be paid on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 15, 2026. The bank, headquartered in Pikeville, Kentucky, manages $6.7 billion in assets and operates numerous banking and trust locations across Kentucky, West Virginia, and Tennessee.

feed.title: Astrotech Corp - To Offer Securities Worth $30 Million
feed.summary: Astrotech Corp announced its plan to offer securities valued at $30 million. This news, reported by Reuters, is pertinent to investors interested in US stocks and IPOs related to Astrotech Corp.

feed.title: Valero Energy: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp. reported a strong fourth quarter, with net income of $1.13 billion, or $3.73 per share. Adjusted earnings of $3.82 per share surpassed Wall Street estimates of $3.22 per share. The oil refiner also exceeded revenue expectations, posting $30.37 billion against an anticipated $28.06 billion.

feed.title: Civista Bancshares, Inc. Announces Fourth-Quarter 2025 Financial Results of $0.61 per Common Share, and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results of $2.64 per Common Share
feed.summary: Civista Bancshares, Inc. reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with net income rising to $12.3 million ($0.61 per common share) and $46.2 million ($2.64 per common share) respectively. The company successfully completed the acquisition of The Farmers Savings Bank, significantly increasing its assets, loans, and deposits, and reaffirmed solid credit quality and a disciplined growth strategy. Non-recurring expenses related to the acquisition impacted fourth-quarter net income by $3.4 million pre-tax, yet the efficiency ratio continued to improve.

feed.title: What is Zacks Research's Estimate for LKQ Q3 Earnings?
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q3 2026 EPS estimate for LKQ Corporation to $0.85 from $0.89 and downgraded the stock to a "Strong Sell," also trimming future forecasts. Despite this, the overall analyst consensus remains "Hold" with a price target of $44.33, contrasting with the current market price of around $32.57. LKQ recently reported Q4 earnings of $0.84 EPS, beating estimates, with revenue of $3.50 billion.

feed.title: Fair Isaac (FICO) Analyst Rating Reiterated by Needham | FICO St
feed.summary: Needham has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Fair Isaac (FICO) with an unchanged price target of $1975.00, expressing confidence in the company's potential. This reaffirmation comes amidst other recent analyst ratings, which have largely maintained a positive outlook on FICO, with some analysts raising price targets. The average one-year price target from 19 analysts is $2,025.72, suggesting a significant upside from its current price.

feed.title: Altria Group files annual financial statements and audit reports with SEC
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) has filed its annual consolidated financial statements and audit reports with the SEC, covering the financial years ending December 31, 2025. This filing includes balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements, along with reports from its independent public accounting firm regarding both the financials and internal controls. In related news, Altria announced CEO Billy Gifford's retirement, a quarterly dividend, and received adjusted price targets from Jefferies and UBS due to market segment pressures and performance factors.

This earnings flash was published on January 29, 2026, at 07:35 am EST. Other related news indicates a decrease in fiscal Q4 earnings and the issuance of a 2026 outlook.

feed.title: Watchdog Complaints Put Keurig Dr Pepper Coffee Story Under Fresh Scrutiny
feed.summary: Watchdog group TINA.org has filed new complaints with the FTC and state regulators against Keurig Dr Pepper regarding its K-Cup recyclability claims. This comes despite prior enforcement actions and a class-action settlement, potentially leading to further regulatory scrutiny for the company. The increased attention highlights risks for Keurig Dr Pepper's brand reputation and could influence its coffee segment, which is already under pressure.

feed.title: RBC Cuts Price Target on Badger Meter to $191 From $229, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has lowered its price target for Badger Meter (BMI) to $191 from $229, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment follows Badger Meter's Q4 earnings and revenue report for 2025, which showed the company missing FactSet's estimates with an EPS of $1.14 against an estimated $1.16, and revenue of $220.7 million against an estimated $231.3 million. Despite the lowered target, RBC's continued outperform rating suggests confidence in the company's future prospects.

feed.title: Is TJX (TJX) Turning Resilient Same-Store Sales Into a Durable Off-Price Advantage?
feed.summary: TJX Companies saw a 5% increase in same-store sales across its off-price retail banners, demonstrating strong customer demand for discounted branded merchandise despite broad retail challenges. This performance highlights the effectiveness of TJX's opportunistic inventory sourcing and value-focused model. The article explores how this resilient sales growth impacts TJX's investment appeal amidst sector pressures, noting that while the off-price model is robust, the stock's rich price-to-earnings multiple makes sentiment dependent on sustained execution.

feed.title: Blackstone Inc.: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. (BX) reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, surpassing Wall Street's expectations. The company announced net income of $1.30 per share, with adjusted earnings reaching $1.75 per share, exceeding the average analyst estimate of $1.52. Blackstone's revenue also beat forecasts, coming in at $4.36 billion.

feed.title: A.O. Smith: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: A.O. Smith Corp. (AOS) reported strong fourth-quarter net income of $125.4 million, or 90 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street expectations of 84 cents per share. Although revenue for the quarter missed forecasts at $912.5 million, the company reported full-year profit of $546.2 million on $3.83 billion in revenue. A.O. Smith projects full-year earnings between $3.85 and $4.15 per share, with revenue ranging from $3.9 billion to $4.02 billion.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Up in Premarket Trading; Joby Aviation, Las Vegas Sands Lag
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures showed gains in premarket trading. Among individual stocks, International Business Machines Corp. (IBM) rose 9.5% and Meta Platforms Inc. (META) increased by 8.8% ahead of the market open.

feed.title: Digging Into Demand: Copper's Scarcity Premium Is Rising
feed.summary: Copper prices are surging due to a new, price-inelastic demand driven by global grid electrification and AI's massive energy requirements, while supply is shrinking. Companies like Freeport-McMoRan and Southern Copper are positioned to benefit, the former through innovative leaching technology and the latter through its large reserves and ongoing Tía María project. Investors can also capitalize on this trend through copper-focused ETFs like Global X Copper Miners ETF and Sprott Copper Miners ETF.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE:VLO) Reports Strong Q4 Earnings, Beating Estimates
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE:VLO) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing Wall Street expectations with an adjusted EPS of $3.82 and revenues of $30.37 billion. The company achieved record operational performance, particularly in refining, and continued its capital return program with $4.0 billion for the full year, including a dividend increase. The market reacted positively, with VLO stock up in pre-market trading, reflecting investor optimism for its operational strength and financial health.
